335→            }
336→            "showToast" -> {
337→                val jsonObject = JSONObject(apiParams)
338→                val text = jsonObject.getString("text")
339→                val shortLength = jsonObject.optBoolean("shortLength", true)
340→                val msgDecode = activity.decodeUrl(text)
341→                showThemedToast(context, msgDecode, shortLength)
342→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
343→            }
344→            "showAnswer" -> {
345→                activity.displayCardAnswer()
346→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
347→            }
348→            "answerEase1" -> {
349→                activity.flipOrAnswerCard(Ease.AGAIN)
350→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
351→            }
352→            "answerEase2" -> {
353→                activity.flipOrAnswerCard(Ease.HARD)
354→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
355→            }
356→            "answerEase3" -> {
357→                activity.flipOrAnswerCard(Ease.GOOD)
358→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
359→            }
360→            "answerEase4" -> {
361→                activity.flipOrAnswerCard(Ease.EASY)
362→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
363→            }
364→
365→            "addTagToNote" -> {
366→                val jsonObject = JSONObject(apiParams)
367→                val noteId = jsonObject.getLong("noteId")
368→                val tag = jsonObject.getString("tag")
369→                val note =
370→                    getColUnsafe.getNote(noteId).apply {
371→                        addTag(tag)
372→                    }
373→                getColUnsafe.updateNote(note)
374→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
375→            }
376→            "setNoteTags" -> {
377→                val jsonObject = JSONObject(apiParams)
378→                val noteId = jsonObject.getLong("noteId")
379→                val tags = jsonObject.getJSONArray("tags")
380→                val note =
381→                    getColUnsafe.getNote(noteId).apply {
382→                        setTagsFromStr(getColUnsafe, tags.stringIterable().joinToString(" "))
383→                    }
384→                getColUnsafe.updateNote(note)
385→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
386→            }
387→            "getTagsFromNote" -> {
388→                val jsonObject = JSONObject(apiParams)
389→                val noteId = jsonObject.getLong("noteId")
390→                val note = getColUnsafe.getNote(noteId)
391→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, JSONArray(note.tags).toString())
392→            }
393→            "sttSetLanguage" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, speechRecognizer.setLanguage(apiParams))
394→            "sttStart" -> {
395→                val callback =
396→                    object : JavaScriptSTT.SpeechRecognitionCallback {
397→                        override fun onResult(results: List<String>) {
398→                            activity.lifecycleScope.launch {
399→                                val apiResult = ApiResult.success(Json.encodeToString(ListSerializer(String.serializer()), results))
400→                                val jsonEncodedString = withContext(Dispatchers.Default) { JSONObject.quote(apiResult.toString()) }
401→                                activity.webView!!.evaluateJavascript("ankiSttResult($jsonEncodedString)", null)
402→                            }
403→                        }
404→
405→                        override fun onError(errorMessage: String) {
406→                            activity.lifecycleScope.launch {
407→                                val apiResult = ApiResult.failure(errorMessage)
408→                                val jsonEncodedString = withContext(Dispatchers.Default) { JSONObject.quote(apiResult.toString()) }
409→                                activity.webView!!.evaluateJavascript("ankiSttResult($jsonEncodedString)", null)
410→                            }
411→                        }
412→                    }
413→                speechRecognizer.setRecognitionCallback(callback)
414→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, speechRecognizer.start())
415→            }
416→            "sttStop" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, speechRecognizer.stop())
417→            else -> {
418→                showDeveloperContact(ANKI_JS_ERROR_CODE_ERROR, apiContract.cardSuppliedDeveloperContact)
419→                throw Exception("unhandled request: $methodName")
420→            }
421→        }
422→    }
423→
424→    private fun processAction(
425→        action: () -> Boolean,
426→        apiContract: ApiContract,
427→        errorCode: Int,
428→        conversion: (ApiContract, Boolean) -> ByteArray,
429→    ): ByteArray {
430→        val status = action()
431→        if (!status) {
432→            showDeveloperContact(errorCode, apiContract.cardSuppliedDeveloperContact)
433→        }
434→        return conversion(apiContract, status)
435→    }
436→
437→    @NeedsTest("needs coverage")
438→    private suspend fun ankiSearchCardWithCallback(apiContract: ApiContract): ByteArray =
439→        withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {
440→            val cards =
441→                try {
442→                    searchForRows(apiContract.cardSuppliedData, SortOrder.UseCollectionOrdering(), CardsOrNotes.CARDS)
443→                        .map { withCol { getCard(it.cardOrNoteId) } }
444→                } catch (exc: Exception) {
445→                    activity.webView!!.evaluateJavascript(
446→                        "console.log('${context.getString(R.string.search_card_js_api_no_results)}')",
447→                        null,
448→                    )
449→                    showDeveloperContact(AnkiDroidJsAPIConstants.ANKI_JS_ERROR_CODE_SEARCH_CARD, apiContract.cardSuppliedDeveloperContact)
450→                    return@withContext convertToByteArray(apiContract, false)
451→                }
452→            val searchResult: MutableList<String> = ArrayList()
453→            for (card in cards) {
454→                val jsonObject = JSONObject()
455→                val fieldsData = card.note(getColUnsafe).fields
456→                val fieldsName = card.noteType(getColUnsafe).fieldsNames
457→
458→                val noteId = card.nid
459→                val cardId = card.id
460→                jsonObject.put("cardId", cardId)
461→                jsonObject.put("noteId", noteId)
462→
463→                val jsonFieldObject = JSONObject()
464→                fieldsName.zip(fieldsData).forEach { pair ->
465→                    jsonFieldObject.put(pair.component1(), pair.component2())
466→                }
467→                jsonObject.put("fieldsData", jsonFieldObject)
468→
469→                searchResult.add(jsonObject.toString())
470→            }
471→
472→            // quote result to prevent JSON injection attack
473→            val jsonEncodedString = JSONObject.quote(searchResult.toString())
474→            activity.runOnUiThread {
475→                activity.webView!!.evaluateJavascript("ankiSearchCard($jsonEncodedString)", null)
476→            }
477→            convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
478→        }
479→
480→    open class CardDataForJsApi {
481→        var newCardCount: Int = -1
482→        var lrnCardCount: Int = -1
483→        var revCardCount: Int = -1
484→        var eta = -1
485→        var nextTime1 = ""
486→        var nextTime2 = ""
487→        var nextTime3 = ""
488→        var nextTime4 = ""
489→    }
490→
491→    sealed class ApiResult protected constructor(
492→        private val status: JvmBoolean,
493→    ) {
494→        class Boolean(
495→            status: JvmBoolean,
496→            val value: JvmBoolean,
497→        ) : ApiResult(status) {
498→            override fun putValue(o: JSONObject) {
499→                o.put(VALUE_KEY, value)
500→            }
501→        }
502→
503→        class Integer(
504→            status: JvmBoolean,
505→            val value: JvmInt,
506→        ) : ApiResult(status) {
507→            override fun putValue(o: JSONObject) {
508→                o.put(VALUE_KEY, value)
509→            }
510→        }
511→
512→        class Float(
513→            status: JvmBoolean,
514→            val value: JvmFloat,
515→        ) : ApiResult(status) {
516→            override fun putValue(o: JSONObject) {
517→                o.put(VALUE_KEY, value)
518→            }
519→        }
520→
521→        class Long(
522→            status: JvmBoolean,
523→            val value: JvmLong,
524→        ) : ApiResult(status) {
525→            override fun putValue(o: JSONObject) {
526→                o.put(VALUE_KEY, value)
527→            }
528→        }
529→
530→        class String(
531→            status: JvmBoolean,
532→            val value: JvmString,
533→        ) : ApiResult(status) {
534→            override fun putValue(o: JSONObject) {
535→                o.put(VALUE_KEY, value)
536→            }
537→        }
538→
539→        abstract fun putValue(o: JSONObject)
540→
541→        override fun toString() =
542→            JSONObject()
543→                .apply {
544→                    put(SUCCESS_KEY, status)
545→                    putValue(this)
546→                }.toString()
547→
548→        @Suppress("RemoveRedundantQualifierName") // we don't want `String(true, value)`
549→        companion object {
550→            fun success(value: JvmString) = ApiResult.String(true, value)
551→
552→            fun failure(value: JvmString) = ApiResult.String(false, value)
553→        }
554→    }
555→
556→    class ApiContract(
557→        val isValid: Boolean,
558→        val cardSuppliedDeveloperContact: String,
559→        val cardSuppliedData: String,
560→    )
561→
562→    companion object {
563→        /**
564→         * Key for a success value.
565→         */
566→        const val VALUE_KEY = "value"
567→        const val SUCCESS_KEY = "success"
568→    }
569→}

 20→package com.ichi2.anki
 21→
 22→import android.content.Context
 23→import android.content.Intent
 24→import android.net.Uri
 25→import androidx.lifecycle.lifecycleScope
 26→import com.github.zafarkhaja.semver.Version

 29→import com.ichi2.anki.AnkiDroidJsAPIConstants.ANKI_JS_ERROR_CODE_BURY_CARD
 30→import com.ichi2.anki.AnkiDroidJsAPIConstants.ANKI_JS_ERROR_CODE_ERROR
 31→import com.ichi2.anki.AnkiDroidJsAPIConstants.ANKI_JS_ERROR_CODE_FLAG_CARD
 32→import com.ichi2.anki.AnkiDroidJsAPIConstants.ANKI_JS_ERROR_CODE_MARK_CARD
 33→import com.ichi2.anki.AnkiDroidJsAPIConstants.ANKI_JS_ERROR_CODE_SET_DUE
 34→import com.ichi2.anki.AnkiDroidJsAPIConstants.ANKI_JS_ERROR_CODE_SUSPEND_CARD
 35→import com.ichi2.anki.AnkiDroidJsAPIConstants.ANKI_JS_ERROR_CODE_SUSPEND_NOTE
 36→import com.ichi2.anki.AnkiDroidJsAPIConstants.flagCommands
 37→import com.ichi2.anki.CollectionManager.withCol
 38→import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.ViewerCommand
 39→import com.ichi2.anki.model.CardsOrNotes
 40→import com.ichi2.anki.servicelayer.rescheduleCards
 41→import com.ichi2.anki.servicelayer.resetCards
 42→import com.ichi2.anki.snackbar.setMaxLines
 43→import com.ichi2.anki.snackbar.showSnackbar
 44→import com.ichi2.annotations.NeedsTest
 45→import com.ichi2.libanki.Card
 46→import com.ichi2.libanki.Collection
 47→import com.ichi2.libanki.Decks
 48→import com.ichi2.libanki.SortOrder
 49→import com.ichi2.utils.NetworkUtils
 50→import com.ichi2.utils.stringIterable
 51→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
 52→import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
 53→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
 54→import kotlinx.serialization.builtins.ListSerializer
 55→import kotlinx.serialization.builtins.serializer
 56→import kotlinx.serialization.json.Json
 57→import org.json.JSONArray
 58→import org.json.JSONException
 59→import org.json.JSONObject
 60→import timber.log.Timber
 61→
 62→typealias JvmBoolean = Boolean
 63→typealias JvmInt = Int
 64→typealias JvmFloat = Float
 65→typealias JvmLong = Long
 66→typealias JvmString = String
 67→
 68→open class AnkiDroidJsAPI(
 69→    private val activity: AbstractFlashcardViewer,
 70→) {
 71→    private val currentCard: Card
 72→        get() = activity.currentCard!!
 73→
 74→    private val getColUnsafe: Collection
 75→        get() = activity.getColUnsafe
 76→
 77→    /**
 78→     Javascript Interface class for calling Java function from AnkiDroid WebView
 79→     see js-api.js for available functions
 80→     */
 81→
 82→    private val context: Context = activity
 83→
 84→    // Text to speech
 85→    private val talker = JavaScriptTTS()
 86→
 87→    // Speech to Text
 88→    private val speechRecognizer = JavaScriptSTT(context)
 89→
 90→    open fun convertToByteArray(
 91→        apiContract: ApiContract,
 92→        boolean: Boolean,
 93→    ): ByteArray = ApiResult.Boolean(apiContract.isValid, boolean).toString().toByteArray()
 94→
 95→    open fun convertToByteArray(
 96→        apiContract: ApiContract,
 97→        int: Int,
 98→    ): ByteArray = ApiResult.Integer(apiContract.isValid, int).toString().toByteArray()
 99→
100→    open fun convertToByteArray(
101→        apiContract: ApiContract,
102→        long: Long,
103→    ): ByteArray = ApiResult.Long(apiContract.isValid, long).toString().toByteArray()
104→
105→    open fun convertToByteArray(
106→        apiContract: ApiContract,
107→        string: String,
108→    ): ByteArray = ApiResult.String(apiContract.isValid, string).toString().toByteArray()
109→
110→    /**
111→     * The method parse json data and return api contract object
112→     * @param byteArray
113→     * @return apiContract or null
114→     */
115→    private fun parseJsApiContract(byteArray: ByteArray): ApiContract? {
116→        try {
117→            val data = JSONObject(byteArray.decodeToString())
118→            val cardSuppliedApiVersion = data.optString("version", "")
119→            val cardSuppliedDeveloperContact = data.optString("developer", "")
120→            val cardSuppliedData = data.optString("data", "")
121→            val isValid = requireApiVersion(cardSuppliedApiVersion, cardSuppliedDeveloperContact)
122→            return ApiContract(isValid, cardSuppliedDeveloperContact, cardSuppliedData)
123→        } catch (j: JSONException) {
124→            Timber.w(j)
125→            activity.runOnUiThread {
126→                activity.showSnackbar(context.getString(R.string.invalid_json_data, j.localizedMessage))
127→            }
128→        }
129→        return null
130→    }
131→
132→    /*
133→     * see 02-strings.xml
134→     * Show Error code when mark card or flag card unsupported
135→     * 1 - mark card
136→     * 2 - flag card
137→     *
138→     * show developer contact if js api used in card is deprecated
139→     */
140→    private fun showDeveloperContact(
141→        errorCode: Int,
142→        apiDevContact: String,
143→    ) {
144→        val errorMsg: String = context.getString(R.string.anki_js_error_code, errorCode)
145→        val snackbarMsg: String = context.getString(R.string.api_version_developer_contact, apiDevContact, errorMsg)
146→
147→        activity.showSnackbar(snackbarMsg, Snackbar.LENGTH_INDEFINITE) {
148→            setMaxLines(3)
149→            setAction(R.string.reviewer_invalid_api_version_visit_documentation) {
150→                activity.openUrl(Uri.parse("https://github.com/ankidroid/Anki-Android/wiki"))
151→            }
152→        }
153→    }
154→
155→    /**
156→     * Supplied api version must be equal to current api version to call mark card, toggle flag functions etc.
157→     */
158→    private fun requireApiVersion(
159→        apiVer: String,
160→        apiDevContact: String,
161→    ): Boolean {
162→        try {
163→            if (apiDevContact.isEmpty() || apiVer.isEmpty()) {
164→                activity.runOnUiThread {
165→                    activity.showSnackbar(context.getString(R.string.invalid_json_data, ""))
166→                }
167→                return false
168→            }
169→            val versionCurrent = Version.parse(AnkiDroidJsAPIConstants.CURRENT_JS_API_VERSION)
170→            val versionSupplied = Version.parse(apiVer)
171→
172→            /*
173→             * if api major version equals to supplied major version then return true and also check for minor version and patch version
174→             * show toast for update and contact developer if need updates
175→             * otherwise return false
176→             */
177→            return when {
178→                versionSupplied == versionCurrent -> {
179→                    true
180→                }
181→                versionSupplied.isLowerThan(versionCurrent) -> {
182→                    activity.runOnUiThread {
183→                        activity.showSnackbar(context.getString(R.string.update_js_api_version, apiDevContact))
184→                    }
185→                    versionSupplied.isHigherThanOrEquivalentTo(Version.parse(AnkiDroidJsAPIConstants.MINIMUM_JS_API_VERSION))
186→                }
187→                else -> {
188→                    activity.runOnUiThread {
189→                        activity.showSnackbar(context.getString(R.string.valid_js_api_version, apiDevContact))
190→                    }
191→                    false
192→                }
193→            }
194→        } catch (e: Exception) {
195→            Timber.w(e, "requireApiVersion::exception")
196→        }
197→        return false
198→    }
199→
200→    /**
201→     * Handle js api request,
202→     * some of the methods are overridden in Reviewer.kt and default values are returned.
203→     * @param methodName
204→     * @param bytes
205→     * @param returnDefaultValues `true` if default values should be returned (if non-[Reviewer])
206→     * @return
207→     */
208→    open suspend fun handleJsApiRequest(
209→        methodName: String,
210→        bytes: ByteArray,
211→        returnDefaultValues: Boolean = true,
212→    ) = withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {
213→        // the method will call to set the card supplied data and is valid version for each api request
214→        val apiContract = parseJsApiContract(bytes)!!
215→        // if api not init or is api not called from reviewer then return default -1
216→        // also other action will not be modified
217→        if (!apiContract.isValid or returnDefaultValues) {
218→            return@withContext convertToByteArray(apiContract, -1)
219→        }
220→
221→        val cardDataForJsAPI = activity.getCardDataForJsApi()
222→        val apiParams = apiContract.cardSuppliedData
223→
224→        return@withContext when (methodName) {
225→            "init" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
226→            "newCardCount" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, cardDataForJsAPI.newCardCount)
227→            "lrnCardCount" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, cardDataForJsAPI.lrnCardCount)
228→            "revCardCount" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, cardDataForJsAPI.revCardCount)
229→            "eta" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, cardDataForJsAPI.eta)
230→            "nextTime1" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, cardDataForJsAPI.nextTime1)
231→            "nextTime2" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, cardDataForJsAPI.nextTime2)
232→            "nextTime3" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, cardDataForJsAPI.nextTime3)
233→            "nextTime4" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, cardDataForJsAPI.nextTime4)
234→            "toggleFlag" -> {
235→                if (apiParams !in flagCommands) {
236→                    showDeveloperContact(ANKI_JS_ERROR_CODE_FLAG_CARD, apiContract.cardSuppliedDeveloperContact)
237→                    return@withContext convertToByteArray(apiContract, false)
238→                }
239→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, activity.executeCommand(flagCommands[apiParams]!!))
240→            }
241→            "markCard" ->
242→                processAction({
243→                    activity.executeCommand(ViewerCommand.MARK)
244→                }, apiContract, ANKI_JS_ERROR_CODE_MARK_CARD, ::convertToByteArray)
245→            "buryCard" -> processAction(activity::buryCard, apiContract, ANKI_JS_ERROR_CODE_BURY_CARD, ::convertToByteArray)
246→            "buryNote" -> processAction(activity::buryNote, apiContract, ANKI_JS_ERROR_CODE_BURT_NOTE, ::convertToByteArray)
247→            "suspendCard" -> processAction(activity::suspendCard, apiContract, ANKI_JS_ERROR_CODE_SUSPEND_CARD, ::convertToByteArray)
248→            "suspendNote" -> processAction(activity::suspendNote, apiContract, ANKI_JS_ERROR_CODE_SUSPEND_NOTE, ::convertToByteArray)
249→            "setCardDue" -> {
250→                try {
251→                    val days = apiParams.toInt()
252→                    if (days < 0 || days > 9999) {
253→                        showDeveloperContact(ANKI_JS_ERROR_CODE_SET_DUE, apiContract.cardSuppliedDeveloperContact)
254→                        return@withContext convertToByteArray(apiContract, false)
255→                    }
256→                    activity.launchCatchingTask {
257→                        activity.rescheduleCards(listOf(currentCard.id), days)
258→                    }
259→                    return@withContext convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
260→                } catch (e: NumberFormatException) {
261→                    showDeveloperContact(ANKI_JS_ERROR_CODE_SET_DUE, apiContract.cardSuppliedDeveloperContact)
262→                    return@withContext convertToByteArray(apiContract, false)
263→                }
264→            }
265→            "resetProgress" -> {
266→                val cardIds = listOf(currentCard.id)
267→                activity.launchCatchingTask { activity.resetCards(cardIds) }
268→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
269→            }
270→            "cardMark" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.note(getColUnsafe).hasTag(getColUnsafe, "marked"))
271→            "cardFlag" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.userFlag().code)
272→            "cardReps" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.reps)
273→            "cardInterval" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.ivl)
274→            "cardFactor" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.factor)
275→            "cardMod" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.mod)
276→            "cardId" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.id)
277→            "cardNid" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.nid)
278→            "cardType" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.type.code)
279→            "cardDid" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.did)
280→            "cardLeft" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.left)
281→            "cardODid" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.oDid)
282→            "cardODue" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.oDue)
283→            "cardQueue" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.queue.code)
284→            "cardLapses" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.lapses)
285→            "cardDue" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.due)
286→            "deckName" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, Decks.basename(activity.getColUnsafe.decks.name(currentCard.did)))
287→            "isActiveNetworkMetered" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, NetworkUtils.isActiveNetworkMetered())
288→            "ttsSetLanguage" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, talker.setLanguage(apiParams))
289→            "ttsSpeak" -> {
290→                val jsonObject = JSONObject(apiParams)
291→                val text = jsonObject.getString("text")
292→                val queueMode = jsonObject.getInt("queueMode")
293→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, talker.speak(text, queueMode))
294→            }
295→            "ttsIsSpeaking" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, talker.isSpeaking)
296→            "ttsSetPitch" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, talker.setPitch(apiParams.toFloat()))
297→            "ttsSetSpeechRate" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, talker.setSpeechRate(apiParams.toFloat()))
298→            "ttsFieldModifierIsAvailable" -> {
299→                // Know if {{tts}} is supported - issue #10443
300→                // Return false for now
301→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, false)
302→            }
303→            "ttsStop" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, talker.stop())
304→            "searchCard" -> {
305→                val intent =
306→                    Intent(context, CardBrowser::class.java).apply {
307→                        putExtra("currentCard", currentCard.id)
308→                        putExtra("search_query", apiParams)
309→                    }
310→                activity.startActivity(intent)
311→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
312→            }
313→            "searchCardWithCallback" -> ankiSearchCardWithCallback(apiContract)
314→            "isDisplayingAnswer" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, activity.isDisplayingAnswer)
315→            "addTagToCard" -> {
316→                activity.runOnUiThread { activity.showTagsDialog() }
317→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
318→            }
319→            "isInFullscreen" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, activity.isFullscreen)
320→            "isTopbarShown" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, activity.prefShowTopbar)
321→            "isInNightMode" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, activity.isInNightMode)
322→            "enableHorizontalScrollbar" -> {
323→                activity.webView!!.isHorizontalScrollBarEnabled = apiParams.toBoolean()
324→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
325→            }
326→            "enableVerticalScrollbar" -> {
327→                activity.webView!!.isVerticalScrollBarEnabled = apiParams.toBoolean()
328→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
329→            }
330→            "showNavigationDrawer" -> {
331→                activity.onNavigationPressed()
332→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
333→            }
334→            "showOptionsMenu" -> {
335→                activity.openOptionsMenu()
336→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
337→            }
338→            "showToast" -> {
339→                val jsonObject = JSONObject(apiParams)
340→                val text = jsonObject.getString("text")
341→                val shortLength = jsonObject.optBoolean("shortLength", true)
342→                val msgDecode = activity.decodeUrl(text)
343→                showThemedToast(context, msgDecode, shortLength)
344→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
345→            }
346→            "showAnswer" -> {
347→                activity.displayCardAnswer()
348→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
349→            }
350→            "answerEase1" -> {
351→                activity.flipOrAnswerCard(Ease.AGAIN)
352→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
353→            }
354→            "answerEase2" -> {
355→                activity.flipOrAnswerCard(Ease.HARD)
356→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
357→            }
358→            "answerEase3" -> {
359→                activity.flipOrAnswerCard(Ease.GOOD)
360→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
361→            }
362→            "answerEase4" -> {
363→                activity.flipOrAnswerCard(Ease.EASY)
364→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
365→            }
366→
367→            "addTagToNote" -> {
368→                val jsonObject = JSONObject(apiParams)
369→                val noteId = jsonObject.getLong("noteId")
370→                val tag = jsonObject.getString("tag")
371→                val note =
372→                    getColUnsafe.getNote(noteId).apply {
373→                        addTag(tag)
374→                    }
375→                getColUnsafe.updateNote(note)
376→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
377→            }
378→            "setNoteTags" -> {
379→                val jsonObject = JSONObject(apiParams)
380→                val noteId = jsonObject.getLong("noteId")
381→                val tags = jsonObject.getJSONArray("tags")
382→                val note =
383→                    getColUnsafe.getNote(noteId).apply {
384→                        setTagsFromStr(getColUnsafe, tags.stringIterable().joinToString(" "))
385→                    }
386→                getColUnsafe.updateNote(note)
387→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
388→            }
389→            "getTagsFromNote" -> {
390→                val jsonObject = JSONObject(apiParams)
391→                val noteId = jsonObject.getLong("noteId")
392→                val note = getColUnsafe.getNote(noteId)
393→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, JSONArray(note.tags).toString())
394→            }
395→            "sttSetLanguage" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, speechRecognizer.setLanguage(apiParams))
396→            "sttStart" -> {
397→                val callback =
398→                    object : JavaScriptSTT.SpeechRecognitionCallback {
399→                        override fun onResult(results: List<String>) {
400→                            activity.lifecycleScope.launch {
401→                                val apiResult = ApiResult.success(Json.encodeToString(ListSerializer(String.serializer()), results))
402→                                val jsonEncodedString = withContext(Dispatchers.Default) { JSONObject.quote(apiResult.toString()) }
403→                                activity.webView!!.evaluateJavascript("ankiSttResult($jsonEncodedString)", null)
404→                            }
405→                        }
406→
407→                        override fun onError(errorMessage: String) {
408→                            activity.lifecycleScope.launch {
409→                                val apiResult = ApiResult.failure(errorMessage)
410→                                val jsonEncodedString = withContext(Dispatchers.Default) { JSONObject.quote(apiResult.toString()) }
411→                                activity.webView!!.evaluateJavascript("ankiSttResult($jsonEncodedString)", null)
412→                            }
413→                        }
414→                    }
415→                speechRecognizer.setRecognitionCallback(callback)
416→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, speechRecognizer.start())
417→            }
418→            "sttStop" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, speechRecognizer.stop())
419→            else -> {
420→                showDeveloperContact(ANKI_JS_ERROR_CODE_ERROR, apiContract.cardSuppliedDeveloperContact)
421→                throw Exception("unhandled request: $methodName")
422→            }
423→        }
424→    }
425→
426→    private fun processAction(
427→        action: () -> Boolean,
428→        apiContract: ApiContract,
429→        errorCode: Int,
430→        conversion: (ApiContract, Boolean) -> ByteArray,
431→    ): ByteArray {
432→        val status = action()
433→        if (!status) {
434→            showDeveloperContact(errorCode, apiContract.cardSuppliedDeveloperContact)
435→        }
436→        return conversion(apiContract, status)
437→    }
438→
439→    @NeedsTest("needs coverage")
440→    private suspend fun ankiSearchCardWithCallback(apiContract: ApiContract): ByteArray =
441→        withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {
442→            val cards =
443→                try {
444→                    searchForRows(apiContract.cardSuppliedData, SortOrder.UseCollectionOrdering(), CardsOrNotes.CARDS)
445→                        .map { withCol { getCard(it.cardOrNoteId) } }
446→                } catch (exc: Exception) {
447→                    activity.webView!!.evaluateJavascript(
448→                        "console.log('${context.getString(R.string.search_card_js_api_no_results)}')",
449→                        null,
450→                    )
451→                    showDeveloperContact(AnkiDroidJsAPIConstants.ANKI_JS_ERROR_CODE_SEARCH_CARD, apiContract.cardSuppliedDeveloperContact)
452→                    return@withContext convertToByteArray(apiContract, false)
453→                }
454→            val searchResult: MutableList<String> = ArrayList()
455→            for (card in cards) {
456→                val jsonObject = JSONObject()
457→                val fieldsData = card.note(getColUnsafe).fields
458→                val fieldsName = card.noteType(getColUnsafe).fieldsNames
459→
460→                val noteId = card.nid
461→                val cardId = card.id
462→                jsonObject.put("cardId", cardId)
463→                jsonObject.put("noteId", noteId)
464→
465→                val jsonFieldObject = JSONObject()
466→                fieldsName.zip(fieldsData).forEach { pair ->
467→                    jsonFieldObject.put(pair.component1(), pair.component2())
468→                }
469→                jsonObject.put("fieldsData", jsonFieldObject)
470→
471→                searchResult.add(jsonObject.toString())
472→            }
473→
474→            // quote result to prevent JSON injection attack
475→            val jsonEncodedString = JSONObject.quote(searchResult.toString())
476→            activity.runOnUiThread {
477→                activity.webView!!.evaluateJavascript("ankiSearchCard($jsonEncodedString)", null)
478→            }
479→            convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
480→        }
481→

484→        var lrnCardCount: Int = -1
485→        var revCardCount: Int = -1
486→        var eta = -1
487→        var nextTime1 = ""
488→        var nextTime2 = ""
489→        var nextTime3 = ""
490→        var nextTime4 = ""
491→    }

493→    sealed class ApiResult protected constructor(
494→        private val status: JvmBoolean,
495→    ) {
496→        class Boolean(
497→            status: JvmBoolean,
498→            val value: JvmBoolean,
499→        ) : ApiResult(status) {
500→            override fun putValue(o: JSONObject) {
501→                o.put(VALUE_KEY, value)
502→            }
503→        }
504→
505→        class Integer(
506→            status: JvmBoolean,
507→            val value: JvmInt,
508→        ) : ApiResult(status) {
509→            override fun putValue(o: JSONObject) {
510→                o.put(VALUE_KEY, value)
511→            }
512→        }
513→
514→        class Float(
515→            status: JvmBoolean,
516→            val value: JvmFloat,
517→        ) : ApiResult(status) {
518→            override fun putValue(o: JSONObject) {
519→                o.put(VALUE_KEY, value)
520→            }
521→        }
522→
523→        class Long(
524→            status: JvmBoolean,
525→            val value: JvmLong,
526→        ) : ApiResult(status) {
527→            override fun putValue(o: JSONObject) {
528→                o.put(VALUE_KEY, value)
529→            }
530→        }
531→
532→        class String(
533→            status: JvmBoolean,
534→            val value: JvmString,
535→        ) : ApiResult(status) {
536→            override fun putValue(o: JSONObject) {
537→                o.put(VALUE_KEY, value)
538→            }
539→        }
540→
541→        abstract fun putValue(o: JSONObject)
542→
543→        override fun toString() =
544→            JSONObject()
545→                .apply {
546→                    put(SUCCESS_KEY, status)
547→                    putValue(this)
548→                }.toString()
549→
550→        @Suppress("RemoveRedundantQualifierName") // we don't want `String(true, value)`
551→        companion object {
552→            fun success(value: JvmString) = ApiResult.String(true, value)
553→
554→            fun failure(value: JvmString) = ApiResult.String(false, value)
555→        }
556→    }
557→

559→        val isValid: Boolean,
560→        val cardSuppliedDeveloperContact: String,
561→        val cardSuppliedData: String,
562→    )
563→
564→    companion object {
565→        /**
566→         * Key for a success value.
567→         */
568→        const val VALUE_KEY = "value"
569→        const val SUCCESS_KEY = "success"
570→    }
571→}

content.text:
The issue requested adding a JS API function to remove a specific tag, but the discussion evolved into implementing a more general `setNoteTags` (to replace all tags) and `getTagsFromNote` (to get current tags).

I have implemented the following:

1.  **Modified `AnkiDroid/src/main/assets/scripts/js-api.js`**:
    *   Added `ankiSetNoteTags` and `ankiGetTagsFromNote` to `jsApiList`.
    *   Implemented the handling for these new methods in `AnkiDroidJS` class.

2.  **Modified `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/AnkiDroidJsAPI.kt`**:
    *   Added imports for `com.ichi2.utils.stringIterable` and `org.json.JSONArray`.
    *   Implemented `setNoteTags` logic:
        *   It receives `noteId` and a JSON array of `tags`.
        *   It converts the JSON array to a space-separated string using `stringIterable().joinToString(" ")` (since Anki tags are space-separated).
        *   It uses `setTagsFromStr` to update the note's tags.
        *   It updates the note in the collection.
    *   Implemented `getTagsFromNote` logic:
        *   It receives `noteId`.
        *   It retrieves the note and returns its tags as a JSON array string.

I verified the changes by creating a temporary test file `AnkiDroid/src/test/java/com/ichi2/anki/AnkiDroidJsAPINoteTagsTest.kt` which successfully added a note, retrieved its tags, and updated its tags using the new API methods. The test passed, confirming the implementation is correct. I have removed the temporary test file.

Files modified:
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/assets/scripts/js-api.js`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/AnkiDroidJsAPI.kt`

108→    /**
109→     * The method parse json data and return api contract object
110→     * @param byteArray
111→     * @return apiContract or null
112→     */
113→    private fun parseJsApiContract(byteArray: ByteArray): ApiContract? {
114→        try {
115→            val data = JSONObject(byteArray.decodeToString())
116→            val cardSuppliedApiVersion = data.optString("version", "")
117→            val cardSuppliedDeveloperContact = data.optString("developer", "")
118→            val cardSuppliedData = data.optString("data", "")
119→            val isValid = requireApiVersion(cardSuppliedApiVersion, cardSuppliedDeveloperContact)
120→            return ApiContract(isValid, cardSuppliedDeveloperContact, cardSuppliedData)
121→        } catch (j: JSONException) {
122→            Timber.w(j)
123→            activity.runOnUiThread {
124→                activity.showSnackbar(context.getString(R.string.invalid_json_data, j.localizedMessage))
125→            }
126→        }
127→        return null
128→    }
129→
130→    /*
131→     * see 02-strings.xml
132→     * Show Error code when mark card or flag card unsupported
133→     * 1 - mark card
134→     * 2 - flag card
135→     *
136→     * show developer contact if js api used in card is deprecated
137→     */
138→    private fun showDeveloperContact(
139→        errorCode: Int,
140→        apiDevContact: String,
141→    ) {
142→        val errorMsg: String = context.getString(R.string.anki_js_error_code, errorCode)
143→        val snackbarMsg: String = context.getString(R.string.api_version_developer_contact, apiDevContact, errorMsg)
144→
145→        activity.showSnackbar(snackbarMsg, Snackbar.LENGTH_INDEFINITE) {
146→            setMaxLines(3)
147→            setAction(R.string.reviewer_invalid_api_version_visit_documentation) {
148→                activity.openUrl(Uri.parse("https://github.com/ankidroid/Anki-Android/wiki"))
149→            }
150→        }
151→    }
152→
153→    /**
154→     * Supplied api version must be equal to current api version to call mark card, toggle flag functions etc.
155→     */
156→    private fun requireApiVersion(
157→        apiVer: String,
158→        apiDevContact: String,
159→    ): Boolean {
160→        try {
161→            if (apiDevContact.isEmpty() || apiVer.isEmpty()) {
162→                activity.runOnUiThread {
163→                    activity.showSnackbar(context.getString(R.string.invalid_json_data, ""))
164→                }
165→                return false
166→            }
167→            val versionCurrent = Version.parse(AnkiDroidJsAPIConstants.CURRENT_JS_API_VERSION)
168→            val versionSupplied = Version.parse(apiVer)
169→
170→            /*
171→             * if api major version equals to supplied major version then return true and also check for minor version and patch version
172→             * show toast for update and contact developer if need updates
173→             * otherwise return false
174→             */
175→            return when {
176→                versionSupplied == versionCurrent -> {
177→                    true
178→                }
179→                versionSupplied.isLowerThan(versionCurrent) -> {
180→                    activity.runOnUiThread {
181→                        activity.showSnackbar(context.getString(R.string.update_js_api_version, apiDevContact))
182→                    }
183→                    versionSupplied.isHigherThanOrEquivalentTo(Version.parse(AnkiDroidJsAPIConstants.MINIMUM_JS_API_VERSION))
184→                }
185→                else -> {
186→                    activity.runOnUiThread {
187→                        activity.showSnackbar(context.getString(R.string.valid_js_api_version, apiDevContact))
188→                    }
189→                    false
190→                }
191→            }
192→        } catch (e: Exception) {
193→            Timber.w(e, "requireApiVersion::exception")
194→        }
195→        return false
196→    }

198→    /**
199→     * Handle js api request,
200→     * some of the methods are overridden in Reviewer.kt and default values are returned.
201→     * @param methodName
202→     * @param bytes
203→     * @param returnDefaultValues `true` if default values should be returned (if non-[Reviewer])
204→     * @return
205→     */
206→    open suspend fun handleJsApiRequest(
207→        methodName: String,
208→        bytes: ByteArray,
209→        returnDefaultValues: Boolean = true,
210→    ) = withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {
211→        // the method will call to set the card supplied data and is valid version for each api request
212→        val apiContract = parseJsApiContract(bytes)!!
213→        // if api not init or is api not called from reviewer then return default -1
214→        // also other action will not be modified
215→        if (!apiContract.isValid or returnDefaultValues) {
216→            return@withContext convertToByteArray(apiContract, -1)
217→        }
218→
219→        val cardDataForJsAPI = activity.getCardDataForJsApi()
220→        val apiParams = apiContract.cardSuppliedData
221→
222→        return@withContext when (methodName) {
223→            "init" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
224→            "newCardCount" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, cardDataForJsAPI.newCardCount)
225→            "lrnCardCount" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, cardDataForJsAPI.lrnCardCount)
226→            "revCardCount" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, cardDataForJsAPI.revCardCount)
227→            "eta" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, cardDataForJsAPI.eta)
228→            "nextTime1" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, cardDataForJsAPI.nextTime1)
229→            "nextTime2" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, cardDataForJsAPI.nextTime2)
230→            "nextTime3" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, cardDataForJsAPI.nextTime3)
231→            "nextTime4" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, cardDataForJsAPI.nextTime4)
232→            "toggleFlag" -> {
233→                if (apiParams !in flagCommands) {
234→                    showDeveloperContact(ANKI_JS_ERROR_CODE_FLAG_CARD, apiContract.cardSuppliedDeveloperContact)
235→                    return@withContext convertToByteArray(apiContract, false)
236→                }
237→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, activity.executeCommand(flagCommands[apiParams]!!))
238→            }
239→            "markCard" ->
240→                processAction({
241→                    activity.executeCommand(ViewerCommand.MARK)
242→                }, apiContract, ANKI_JS_ERROR_CODE_MARK_CARD, ::convertToByteArray)
243→            "buryCard" -> processAction(activity::buryCard, apiContract, ANKI_JS_ERROR_CODE_BURY_CARD, ::convertToByteArray)
244→            "buryNote" -> processAction(activity::buryNote, apiContract, ANKI_JS_ERROR_CODE_BURT_NOTE, ::convertToByteArray)
245→            "suspendCard" -> processAction(activity::suspendCard, apiContract, ANKI_JS_ERROR_CODE_SUSPEND_CARD, ::convertToByteArray)
246→            "suspendNote" -> processAction(activity::suspendNote, apiContract, ANKI_JS_ERROR_CODE_SUSPEND_NOTE, ::convertToByteArray)
247→            "setCardDue" -> {
248→                try {
249→                    val days = apiParams.toInt()
250→                    if (days < 0 || days > 9999) {
251→                        showDeveloperContact(ANKI_JS_ERROR_CODE_SET_DUE, apiContract.cardSuppliedDeveloperContact)
252→                        return@withContext convertToByteArray(apiContract, false)
253→                    }
254→                    activity.launchCatchingTask {
255→                        activity.rescheduleCards(listOf(currentCard.id), days)
256→                    }
257→                    return@withContext convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
258→                } catch (e: NumberFormatException) {
259→                    showDeveloperContact(ANKI_JS_ERROR_CODE_SET_DUE, apiContract.cardSuppliedDeveloperContact)
260→                    return@withContext convertToByteArray(apiContract, false)
261→                }
262→            }
263→            "resetProgress" -> {
264→                val cardIds = listOf(currentCard.id)
265→                activity.launchCatchingTask { activity.resetCards(cardIds) }
266→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
267→            }
268→            "cardMark" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.note(getColUnsafe).hasTag(getColUnsafe, "marked"))
269→            "cardFlag" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.userFlag().code)
270→            "cardReps" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.reps)
271→            "cardInterval" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.ivl)
272→            "cardFactor" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.factor)
273→            "cardMod" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.mod)
274→            "cardId" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.id)
275→            "cardNid" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.nid)
276→            "cardType" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.type.code)
277→            "cardDid" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.did)
278→            "cardLeft" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.left)
279→            "cardODid" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.oDid)
280→            "cardODue" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.oDue)
281→            "cardQueue" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.queue.code)
282→            "cardLapses" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.lapses)
283→            "cardDue" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, currentCard.due)
284→            "deckName" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, Decks.basename(activity.getColUnsafe.decks.name(currentCard.did)))
285→            "isActiveNetworkMetered" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, NetworkUtils.isActiveNetworkMetered())
286→            "ttsSetLanguage" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, talker.setLanguage(apiParams))
287→            "ttsSpeak" -> {

302→            "searchCard" -> {

340→                val msgDecode = activity.decodeUrl(text)

365→            "addTagToNote" -> {
366→                val jsonObject = JSONObject(apiParams)
367→                val noteId = jsonObject.getLong("noteId")
368→                val tag = jsonObject.getString("tag")
369→                val note =
370→                    getColUnsafe.getNote(noteId).apply {
371→                        addTag(tag)
372→                    }
373→                getColUnsafe.updateNote(note)
374→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
375→            }
376→            "sttSetLanguage" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, speechRecognizer.setLanguage(apiParams))
377→            "sttStart" -> {
378→                val callback =
379→                    object : JavaScriptSTT.SpeechRecognitionCallback {
380→                        override fun onResult(results: List<String>) {
381→                            activity.lifecycleScope.launch {
382→                                val apiResult = ApiResult.success(Json.encodeToString(ListSerializer(String.serializer()), results))
383→                                val jsonEncodedString = withContext(Dispatchers.Default) { JSONObject.quote(apiResult.toString()) }
384→                                activity.webView!!.evaluateJavascript("ankiSttResult($jsonEncodedString)", null)
385→                            }
386→                        }
387→
388→                        override fun onError(errorMessage: String) {
389→                            activity.lifecycleScope.launch {
390→                                val apiResult = ApiResult.failure(errorMessage)
391→                                val jsonEncodedString = withContext(Dispatchers.Default) { JSONObject.quote(apiResult.toString()) }
392→                                activity.webView!!.evaluateJavascript("ankiSttResult($jsonEncodedString)", null)
393→                            }
394→                        }
395→                    }
396→                speechRecognizer.setRecognitionCallback(callback)
397→                convertToByteArray(apiContract, speechRecognizer.start())
398→            }
399→            "sttStop" -> convertToByteArray(apiContract, speechRecognizer.stop())
400→            else -> {
401→                showDeveloperContact(ANKI_JS_ERROR_CODE_ERROR, apiContract.cardSuppliedDeveloperContact)
402→                throw Exception("unhandled request: $methodName")
403→            }
404→        }
405→    }

407→    private fun processAction(
408→        action: () -> Boolean,
409→        apiContract: ApiContract,
410→        errorCode: Int,
411→        conversion: (ApiContract, Boolean) -> ByteArray,
412→    ): ByteArray {
413→        val status = action()
414→        if (!status) {
415→            showDeveloperContact(errorCode, apiContract.cardSuppliedDeveloperContact)
416→        }
417→        return conversion(apiContract, status)
418→    }

420→    @NeedsTest("needs coverage")
421→    private suspend fun ankiSearchCardWithCallback(apiContract: ApiContract): ByteArray =
422→        withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {
423→            val cards =
424→                try {
425→                    searchForRows(apiContract.cardSuppliedData, SortOrder.UseCollectionOrdering(), CardsOrNotes.CARDS)
426→                        .map { withCol { getCard(it.cardOrNoteId) } }
427→                } catch (exc: Exception) {
428→                    activity.webView!!.evaluateJavascript(
429→                        "console.log('${context.getString(R.string.search_card_js_api_no_results)}')",
430→                        null,
431→                    )
432→                    showDeveloperContact(AnkiDroidJsAPIConstants.ANKI_JS_ERROR_CODE_SEARCH_CARD, apiContract.cardSuppliedDeveloperContact)
433→                    return@withContext convertToByteArray(apiContract, false)
434→                }
435→            val searchResult: MutableList<String> = ArrayList()
436→            for (card in cards) {
437→                val jsonObject = JSONObject()
438→                val fieldsData = card.note(getColUnsafe).fields
439→                val fieldsName = card.noteType(getColUnsafe).fieldsNames
440→
441→                val noteId = card.nid
442→                val cardId = card.id
443→                jsonObject.put("cardId", cardId)
444→                jsonObject.put("noteId", noteId)
445→
446→                val jsonFieldObject = JSONObject()
447→                fieldsName.zip(fieldsData).forEach { pair ->
448→                    jsonFieldObject.put(pair.component1(), pair.component2())
449→                }
450→                jsonObject.put("fieldsData", jsonFieldObject)
451→
452→                searchResult.add(jsonObject.toString())
453→            }
454→
455→            // quote result to prevent JSON injection attack
456→            val jsonEncodedString = JSONObject.quote(searchResult.toString())
457→            activity.runOnUiThread {
458→                activity.webView!!.evaluateJavascript("ankiSearchCard($jsonEncodedString)", null)
459→            }
460→            convertToByteArray(apiContract, true)
461→        }

474→    sealed class ApiResult protected constructor(
475→        private val status: JvmBoolean,
476→    ) {
477→        class Boolean(
478→            status: JvmBoolean,
479→            val value: JvmBoolean,
480→        ) : ApiResult(status) {
481→            override fun putValue(o: JSONObject) {
482→                o.put(VALUE_KEY, value)
483→            }
484→        }
485→
486→        class Integer(
487→            status: JvmBoolean,
488→            val value: JvmInt,
489→        ) : ApiResult(status) {
490→            override fun putValue(o: JSONObject) {
491→                o.put(VALUE_KEY, value)
492→            }
493→        }
494→
495→        class Float(
496→            status: JvmBoolean,
497→            val value: JvmFloat,
498→        ) : ApiResult(status) {
499→            override fun putValue(o: JSONObject) {
500→                o.put(VALUE_KEY, value)
501→            }
502→        }
503→
504→        class Long(
505→            status: JvmBoolean,
506→            val value: JvmLong,
507→        ) : ApiResult(status) {
508→            override fun putValue(o: JSONObject) {
509→                o.put(VALUE_KEY, value)
510→            }
511→        }
512→
513→        class String(
514→            status: JvmBoolean,
515→            val value: JvmString,
516→        ) : ApiResult(status) {
517→            override fun putValue(o: JSONObject) {
518→                o.put(VALUE_KEY, value)
519→            }
520→        }
521→
522→        abstract fun putValue(o: JSONObject)
523→
524→        override fun toString() =
525→            JSONObject()
526→                .apply {
527→                    put(SUCCESS_KEY, status)
528→                    putValue(this)
529→                }.toString()
530→
531→        @Suppress("RemoveRedundantQualifierName") // we don't want `String(true, value)`
532→        companion object {
533→            fun success(value: JvmString) = ApiResult.String(true, value)
534→
535→            fun failure(value: JvmString) = ApiResult.String(false, value)
536→        }
537→    }

539→    class ApiContract(
540→        val isValid: Boolean,
541→        val cardSuppliedDeveloperContact: String,
542→        val cardSuppliedData: String,
543→    )
544→
545→    companion object {
546→        /**
547→         * Key for a success value.
548→         */
549→        const val VALUE_KEY = "value"
550→        const val SUCCESS_KEY = "success"
551→    }
552→}

42→package com.ichi2.utils
43→
44→import org.json.JSONArray
45→import org.json.JSONObject
46→
47→fun JSONArray.deepClone(): JSONArray {
48→    val clone = JSONArray()
49→    for (i in 0 until length()) {
50→        clone.put(
51→            when (get(i)) {
52→                is JSONObject -> getJSONObject(i).deepClone()
53→                is JSONArray -> getJSONArray(i).deepClone()
54→                else -> get(i)
55→            },
56→        )
57→    }
58→    return clone
59→}
60→
61→fun JSONArray.jsonObjectIterable(): Iterable<JSONObject> = Iterable { jsonObjectIterator() }
62→
63→@KotlinCleanup("see if jsonObject/string/longIterator() methods can be combined into one")
64→fun JSONArray.jsonObjectIterator(): Iterator<JSONObject> =
65→    object : Iterator<JSONObject> {
66→        private var index = 0
67→
68→        override fun hasNext(): Boolean = index < length()
69→
70→        override fun next() =
71→            getJSONObject(index).also {
72→                index++
73→            }
74→    }
75→
76→fun JSONArray.stringIterable(): Iterable<String> = Iterable { stringIterator() }
77→
78→fun JSONArray.stringIterator(): Iterator<String> {
79→    return object : Iterator<String> {
80→        private var index = 0
81→
82→        override fun hasNext(): Boolean = index < length()
83→
84→        override fun next(): String {
85→            val string = getString(index)
86→            index++
87→            return string
88→        }
89→    }
90→}
91→
92→/**
93→ * @return Given an array of objects, return the array of the value with `key`, assuming that they are String.
94→ * E.g. templates, fields are a JSONArray whose objects have name
95→ */
96→fun JSONArray.toStringList(key: String): List<String> = jsonObjectIterable().map { it.getString(key) }

 18→package com.ichi2.libanki
 19→
 20→import androidx.annotation.CheckResult
 21→import androidx.annotation.VisibleForTesting
 22→import anki.notes.NoteFieldsCheckResponse
 23→import com.ichi2.libanki.Consts.DEFAULT_DECK_ID
 24→import com.ichi2.libanki.backend.model.toBackendNote
 25→import com.ichi2.libanki.utils.LibAnkiAlias
 26→import com.ichi2.libanki.utils.NotInLibAnki
 27→import com.ichi2.utils.KotlinCleanup
 28→import com.ichi2.utils.emptyStringArray
 29→import java.util.regex.Pattern
 30→
 31→@KotlinCleanup("lots to do")
 32→class Note : Cloneable {
 33→    /**
 34→     * Should only be mutated by addNote()
 35→     */
 36→    var id: NoteId = 0L
 37→
 38→    @get:VisibleForTesting
 39→    var guId: String? = null
 40→        private set
 41→    lateinit var notetype: NotetypeJson
 42→
 43→    val noteTypeId: NoteTypeId
 44→        get() = mid
 45→
 46→    /** for upstream compatibility, use [noteTypeId] outside libAnki */
 47→    private var mid: NoteTypeId = 0L
 48→    lateinit var tags: MutableList<String>
 49→    lateinit var fields: MutableList<String>
 50→    private var fMap: Map<String, Pair<Int, Field>>? = null
 51→    var usn = 0
 52→        private set
 53→    var mod: Int = 0
 54→        private set
 55→
 56→    constructor(col: Collection, id: NoteId) {
 57→        this.id = id
 58→        load(col)
 59→    }
 60→
 61→    constructor(col: Collection, backendNote: anki.notes.Note) {
 62→        loadFromBackendNote(col, backendNote)
 63→    }
 64→
 65→    companion object {
 66→        fun fromNotetypeId(
 67→            col: Collection,
 68→            ntid: NoteTypeId,
 69→        ): Note {
 70→            val backendNote = col.backend.newNote(ntid)
 71→            return Note(col, backendNote)
 72→        }
 73→    }
 74→
 75→    fun load(col: Collection) {
 76→        val note = col.backend.getNote(id)
 77→        loadFromBackendNote(col, note)
 78→    }
 79→
 80→    @LibAnkiAlias("_load_from_backend_note")
 81→    private fun loadFromBackendNote(
 82→        col: Collection,
 83→        note: anki.notes.Note,
 84→    ) {
 85→        id = note.id
 86→        guId = note.guid
 87→        mid = note.notetypeId
 88→        notetype = col.notetypes.get(noteTypeId)!! // not in libAnki
 89→        mod = note.mtimeSecs
 90→        usn = note.usn
 91→        // the lists in the protobuf are NOT mutable, even though they cast to MutableList
 92→        tags = note.tagsList.toMutableList()
 93→        fields = note.fieldsList.toMutableList()
 94→        fMap = Notetypes.fieldMap(notetype)
 95→    }
 96→
 97→    @NotInLibAnki
 98→    fun numberOfCards(col: Collection): Int = cardIds(col).size
 99→
100→    fun cardIds(col: Collection): List<Long> = col.cardIdsOfNote(nid = id)
101→
102→    fun cards(col: Collection): List<Card> = cardIds(col).map { col.getCard(it) }
103→
104→    @LibAnkiAlias("ephemeral_card")
105→    fun ephemeralCard(
106→        col: Collection,
107→        ord: Int = 0,
108→        customNoteType: NotetypeJson? = null,
109→        customTemplate: CardTemplate? = null,
110→        fillEmpty: Boolean = false,
111→        deckId: DeckId = DEFAULT_DECK_ID,
112→    ): Card {
113→        val card = Card(col, id = null)
114→        card.ord = ord
115→        card.did = deckId
116→
117→        val model = customNoteType ?: notetype
118→        val template =
119→            if (customTemplate != null) {
120→                customTemplate.deepClone()
121→            } else {
122→                val index = if (model.isStd) ord else 0
123→                model.tmpls[index]
124→            }
125→        // may differ in cloze case
126→        template.setOrd(card.ord)
127→
128→        val output =
129→            TemplateManager.TemplateRenderContext
130→                .fromCardLayout(
131→                    note = this,
132→                    card = card,
133→                    notetype = model,
134→                    template = template,
135→                    fillEmpty = fillEmpty,
136→                ).render(col)
137→        card.renderOutput = output
138→        card.note = this
139→        return card
140→    }
141→
142→    /** The first card, assuming it exists. */
143→    @CheckResult
144→    @NotInLibAnki
145→    fun firstCard(col: Collection): Card =
146→        col.getCard(
147→            col.db.queryLongScalar(
148→                "SELECT id FROM cards WHERE nid = ? ORDER BY ord LIMIT 1",
149→                id,
150→            ),
151→        )
152→
153→    /**
154→     * Dict interface
155→     * ***********************************************************
156→     */
157→    fun keys(): Array<String> = fMap!!.keys.toTypedArray()
158→
159→    @KotlinCleanup("see if we can make this immutable")
160→    fun values(): MutableList<String> = fields
161→
162→    fun items(): Array<Array<String>> {
163→        // TODO: Revisit this method. The field order returned differs from Anki.
164→        // The items here are only used in the note editor, so it's a low priority.
165→        val result =
166→            Array(
167→                fMap!!.size,
168→            ) { emptyStringArray(2) }
169→        for (fname in fMap!!.keys) {
170→            val i = fMap!![fname]!!.first
171→            result[i][0] = fname
172→            result[i][1] = fields[i]
173→        }
174→        return result
175→    }
176→
177→    @LibAnkiAlias("_field_index")
178→    private fun fieldIndex(key: String): Int {
179→        val fieldPair =
180→            fMap!![key]
181→                ?: throw IllegalArgumentException(
182→                    String.format(
183→                        "No field named '%s' found",
184→                        key,
185→                    ),
186→                )
187→        return fieldPair.first
188→    }
189→
190→    @LibAnkiAlias("__getitem__")
191→    fun getItem(key: String): String = fields[fieldIndex(key)]
192→
193→    @LibAnkiAlias("__setitem__")
194→    fun setItem(
195→        key: String,
196→        value: String,
197→    ) {
198→        fields[fieldIndex(key)] = value
199→    }
200→
201→    @LibAnkiAlias("__contains__")
202→    operator fun contains(key: String): Boolean = fMap!!.containsKey(key)
203→
204→    @NotInLibAnki
205→    fun setField(
206→        index: Int,
207→        value: String,
208→    ) {
209→        fields[index] = value
210→    }
211→
212→    /**
213→     * Tags
214→     * ***********************************************************
215→     */
216→
217→    @LibAnkiAlias("has_tag")
218→    fun hasTag(
219→        col: Collection,
220→        tag: String,
221→    ): Boolean = col.tags.inList(tag, tags)
222→
223→    /**
224→     * Add tag. Duplicates will be stripped on save.
225→     */
226→    @LibAnkiAlias("add_tag")
227→    fun addTag(tag: String) {
228→        tags.add(tag)
229→    }
230→
231→    @LibAnkiAlias("remove_tag")
232→    fun removeTag(tag: String) {
233→        val rem: MutableList<String> =
234→            ArrayList(
235→                tags.size,
236→            )
237→        for (t in tags) {
238→            if (t.equals(tag, ignoreCase = true)) {
239→                rem.add(t)
240→            }
241→        }
242→        for (r in rem) {
243→            tags.remove(r)
244→        }
245→    }
246→
247→    @LibAnkiAlias("string_tags")
248→    fun stringTags(col: Collection): String = col.tags.join(col.tags.canonify(tags))
249→
250→    @LibAnkiAlias("set_tags_from_str")
251→    fun setTagsFromStr(
252→        col: Collection,
253→        str: String,
254→    ) {
255→        tags = col.tags.split(str)
256→    }
257→
258→    /**
259→     * Unique/duplicate check
260→     * ***********************************************************
261→     */
262→
263→    @LibAnkiAlias("fields_check")
264→    fun fieldsCheck(col: Collection): NoteFieldsCheckResponse.State = col.backend.noteFieldsCheck(toBackendNote()).state
265→
266→    public override fun clone(): Note =
267→        try {
268→            super.clone() as Note
269→        } catch (e: CloneNotSupportedException) {
270→            throw RuntimeException(e)
271→        }
272→
273→    override fun equals(other: Any?): Boolean {
274→        if (this === other) return true
275→        if (other == null || javaClass != other.javaClass) return false
276→        val note = other as Note
277→        return id == note.id
278→    }
279→
280→    override fun hashCode(): Int = (id xor (id ushr 32)).toInt()
281→
282→    object ClozeUtils {
283→        private val clozeRegexPattern = Pattern.compile("\\{\\{c(\\d+)::")
284→
285→        /**
286→         * Calculate the next number that should be used if inserting a new cloze deletion.
287→         * Per the manual the next number should be greater than any existing cloze deletion
288→         * even if there are gaps in the sequence, and regardless of existing cloze ordering
289→         *
290→         * @param fieldValues Iterable of field values that may contain existing cloze deletions
291→         * @return the next index that a cloze should be inserted at
292→         */
293→        @KotlinCleanup("general regex fixes for '.group' being nullable")
294→        fun getNextClozeIndex(fieldValues: Iterable<String>): Int {
295→            var highestClozeId = 0
296→            // Begin looping through the fields
297→            for (fieldLiteral in fieldValues) {
298→                // Begin searching in the current field for cloze references
299→                val matcher = clozeRegexPattern.matcher(fieldLiteral)
300→                while (matcher.find()) {
301→                    val detectedClozeId = matcher.group(1)!!.toInt()
302→                    if (detectedClozeId > highestClozeId) {
303→                        highestClozeId = detectedClozeId
304→                    }
305→                }
306→            }
307→            return highestClozeId + 1
308→        }
309→    }
310→}

 18→package com.ichi2.libanki
 19→
 20→import androidx.annotation.WorkerThread
 21→import anki.collection.OpChangesWithCount
 22→import com.ichi2.libanki.utils.join
 23→import java.util.AbstractSet
 24→
 25→/**
 26→ * Anki maintains a cache of used tags so it can quickly present a list of tags
 27→ * for autocomplete and in the browser. For efficiency, deletions are not
 28→ * tracked, so unused tags can only be removed from the list with a DB check.
 29→ *
 30→ * This module manages the tag cache and tags for notes.
 31→ *
 32→ */
 33→@WorkerThread
 34→class Tags(
 35→    private val col: Collection,
 36→) {
 37→    /** all tags */
 38→    fun all(): List<String> = col.backend.allTags()
 39→
 40→    fun byDeck(did: DeckId): List<String> =
 41→        col.backend
 42→            .customStudyDefaults(did)
 43→            .tagsList
 44→            .map { it.name }
 45→
 46→    // Legacy signature, used by unit tests.
 47→    fun bulkAdd(
 48→        ids: List<Long>,
 49→        tags: String,
 50→        add: Boolean,
 51→    ) {
 52→        if (add) {
 53→            bulkAdd(ids, tags)
 54→        } else {
 55→            bulkRemove(ids, tags)
 56→        }
 57→    }
 58→
 59→    /** Add space-separate tags to provided notes. */
 60→    fun bulkAdd(
 61→        noteIds: List<NoteId>,
 62→        tags: String,
 63→    ): OpChangesWithCount = col.backend.addNoteTags(noteIds = noteIds, tags = tags)
 64→
 65→    // Remove space-separated tags from provided notes.
 66→    fun bulkRemove(
 67→        noteIds: List<Long>,
 68→        tags: String,
 69→    ): OpChangesWithCount =
 70→        col.backend.removeNoteTags(
 71→            noteIds = noteIds,
 72→            tags = tags,
 73→        )
 74→
 75→    /*
 76→     * String-based utilities
 77→     * ***********************************************************
 78→     */
 79→
 80→    /** Parse a string and return a list of tags. */
 81→    fun split(tags: String): MutableList<String> =
 82→        tags
 83→            .replace('\u3000', ' ')
 84→            .split("\\s".toRegex())
 85→            .filter { it.isNotEmpty() }
 86→            .toMutableList()
 87→
 88→    /** Join tags into a single string, with leading and trailing spaces. */
 89→    fun join(tags: kotlin.collections.Collection<String>): String {
 90→        if (tags.isEmpty()) {
 91→            return ""
 92→        }
 93→        return " ${" ".join(tags)} "
 94→    }
 95→
 96→    /*
 97→     * List-based utilities
 98→     * ***********************************************************
 99→     */
100→
101→    /** {@inheritDoc}  */
102→    fun canonify(tagList: List<String>): AbstractSet<String> {
103→        // this is now a no-op - the tags are canonified when the note is saved
104→
105→        // libAnki difference: tagList was returned directly
106→        return HashSet(tagList)
107→    }
108→
109→    /** True if TAG is in TAGS. Ignore case.*/
110→    fun inList(
111→        tag: String,
112→        tags: Iterable<String>,
113→    ): Boolean = tags.map { it.lowercase() }.contains(tag.lowercase())
114→}
115→
116→fun Collection.completeTagRaw(input: ByteArray): ByteArray = backend.completeTagRaw(input)

 39→    fun ankiGetNextTimeTest() =
 40→        runTest {
 41→            val models = col.notetypes
 42→            val didA = addDeck("Test", setAsSelected = true)
 43→            val basic = models.byName(BASIC_MODEL_NAME)
 44→            basic!!.put("did", didA)
 45→            addBasicNote("foo", "bar")
 46→
 47→            val reviewer: Reviewer = startReviewer()
 48→            val jsapi = reviewer.jsApi
 49→
 50→            reviewer.displayCardAnswer()
 51→
 52→            waitForAsyncTasksToComplete()
 53→
 54→            assertThat(
 55→                getDataFromRequest("nextTime1", jsapi).withoutUnicodeIsolation(),
 56→                equalTo(formatApiResult("<1m")),
 57→            )
 58→            assertThat(
 59→                getDataFromRequest("nextTime2", jsapi).withoutUnicodeIsolation(),
 60→                equalTo(formatApiResult("<6m")),
 61→            )
 62→            assertThat(
 63→                getDataFromRequest("nextTime3", jsapi).withoutUnicodeIsolation(),
 64→                equalTo(formatApiResult("<10m")),
 65→            )
 66→            assertThat(
 67→                getDataFromRequest("nextTime4", jsapi).withoutUnicodeIsolation(),
 68→                equalTo(formatApiResult("4d")),
 69→            )
 70→        }

284→    fun ankiBurySuspendTest() =
285→        runTest {
286→            // js api test for bury and suspend notes and cards
287→            // add five notes, four will be buried and suspended
288→            // count number of notes, if buried or suspended then
289→            // in scheduling the count will be less than previous scheduling
290→            val models = col.notetypes
291→            val didA = addDeck("Test", setAsSelected = true)
292→            val basic = models.byName(BASIC_MODEL_NAME)
293→            basic!!.put("did", didA)
294→            addBasicNote("foo", "bar")
295→            addBasicNote("baz", "bak")
296→            addBasicNote("Anki", "Droid")
297→            addBasicNote("Test Card", "Bury and Suspend Card")
298→            addBasicNote("Test Note", "Bury and Suspend Note")
299→
300→            val reviewer: Reviewer = startReviewer()
301→            val jsapi = reviewer.jsApi
302→
303→            // ----------
304→            // Bury Card
305→            // ----------
306→            // call script to bury current card
307→            assertThat(
308→                getDataFromRequest("buryCard", jsapi),
309→                equalTo(formatApiResult(true)),
310→            )
311→
312→            // count number of notes
313→            val sched = reviewer.getColUnsafe
314→            assertThat(sched.cardCount(), equalTo(4))
315→
316→            // ----------
317→            // Bury Note
318→            // ----------
319→            // call script to bury current note
320→            assertThat(
321→                getDataFromRequest("buryNote", jsapi),
322→                equalTo(formatApiResult(true)),
323→            )
324→
325→            // count number of notes
326→            assertThat(sched.cardCount(), equalTo(3))
327→
328→            // -------------
329→            // Suspend Card
330→            // -------------
331→            // call script to suspend current card
332→            assertThat(
333→                getDataFromRequest("suspendCard", jsapi),
334→                equalTo(formatApiResult(true)),
335→            )
336→
337→            // count number of notes
338→            assertThat(sched.cardCount(), equalTo(2))
339→
340→            // -------------
341→            // Suspend Note
342→            // -------------
343→            // call script to suspend current note
344→            assertThat(
345→                getDataFromRequest("suspendNote", jsapi),
346→                equalTo(formatApiResult(true)),
347→            )
348→
349→            // count number of notes
350→            assertThat(sched.cardCount(), equalTo(1))
351→        }

356→    fun ankiSetCardDueTest() =
357→        runTest {
358→            TimeManager.reset()
359→            val models = col.notetypes
360→            val didA = addDeck("Test", setAsSelected = true)
361→            val basic = models.byName(BASIC_MODEL_NAME)
362→            basic!!.put("did", didA)
363→            addBasicNote("foo", "bar")
364→            addBasicNote("baz", "bak")
365→
366→            val reviewer: Reviewer = startReviewer()
367→            waitForAsyncTasksToComplete()
368→
369→            val jsapi = reviewer.jsApi
370→            // get card id for testing due
371→            val cardIdRes = getDataFromRequest("cardId", jsapi)
372→            val jsonObject = JSONObject(cardIdRes)
373→            val cardId = jsonObject.get(VALUE_KEY).toString().toLong()
374→
375→            // test that card rescheduled for 15 days interval and returned true
376→            assertThat(getDataFromRequest("setCardDue", jsapi, "15"), equalTo(formatApiResult(true)))
377→            waitForAsyncTasksToComplete()
378→
379→            // verify that it did get rescheduled
380→            // --------------------------------
381→            val cardToBeReschedule = col.getCard(cardId)
382→            assertEquals(15 + col.sched.today, cardToBeReschedule.due, "Card is rescheduled")
383→        }

385→    @Test
386→    fun ankiResetProgressTest() =
387→        runTest {
388→            val n = addBasicNote("Front", "Back")
389→            val c = n.firstCard()
390→
391→            // Make card review with 28L due and 280% ease
392→            c.type = CardType.Rev
393→            c.due = 28
394→            c.factor = 2800
395→            c.ivl = 8
396→
397→            // before reset
398→            assertEquals(28, c.due, "Card due before reset")
399→            assertEquals(8, c.ivl, "Card interval before reset")
400→            assertEquals(2800, c.factor, "Card ease before reset")
401→            assertEquals(CardType.Rev, c.type, "Card type before reset")
402→
403→            val reviewer: Reviewer = startReviewer()
404→            waitForAsyncTasksToComplete()
405→
406→            val jsapi = reviewer.jsApi
407→
408→            // test that card reset
409→            assertThat(getDataFromRequest("resetProgress", jsapi), equalTo(formatApiResult(true)))
410→            waitForAsyncTasksToComplete()
411→
412→            // verify that card progress reset
413→            // --------------------------------
414→            val cardAfterReset = col.getCard(reviewer.currentCard!!.id)
415→            assertEquals(2, cardAfterReset.due, "Card due after reset")
416→            assertEquals(0, cardAfterReset.ivl, "Card interval after reset")
417→            assertEquals(CardType.New, cardAfterReset.type, "Card type after reset")
418→        }

420→    companion object {
421→        fun jsApiContract(data: String = ""): ByteArray =
422→            JSONObject()
423→                .apply {
424→                    put("version", "0.0.3")
425→                    put("developer", "test@example.com")
426→                    put("data", data)
427→                }.toString()
428→                .toByteArray()
429→
430→        private inline fun formatSuccessfulApiResult(block: JSONObject.() -> Unit) =
431→            JSONObject()
432→                .apply {
433→                    put(SUCCESS_KEY, true)
434→                    block(this)
435→                }.toString()
436→
437→        fun formatApiResult(res: Boolean) = formatSuccessfulApiResult { put(VALUE_KEY, res) }
438→
439→        fun formatApiResult(res: Int) = formatSuccessfulApiResult { put(VALUE_KEY, res) }
440→
441→        fun formatApiResult(res: Long) = formatSuccessfulApiResult { put(VALUE_KEY, res) }
442→
443→        fun formatApiResult(res: String) = formatSuccessfulApiResult { put(VALUE_KEY, res) }
444→
445→        suspend fun getDataFromRequest(
446→            methodName: String,
447→            jsAPI: AnkiDroidJsAPI,
448→            apiData: String = "",
449→        ): String =
450→            jsAPI
451→                .handleJsApiRequest(methodName, jsApiContract(apiData), false)
452→                .decodeToString()
453→    }
454→}
